name: Parakeet TDT 0.6b-v3 on Short Clips (Biased — Single-Chunk Degenerate for sub-2 s)
short_description: Per-clip transcription predictions from Parakeet TDT 0.6b-v3 (NeMo, GPU-PB phrase boosting) on 44 synthetic short clips (0.5-3 s). Labeled 'biased' because 16/44 clips (sub-2 s) hit the degenerate single-chunk path where the entire clip arrives as one 32kB chunk, affecting the streaming simulation fidelity.
model_description: Parakeet TDT 0.6b-v3 loaded from /home/azureuser/parakeet-model/parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3 (NeMo 3.1.0). GPU-PB phrase boosting applied with alpha=1.0, 66 casing variants of 31 domain vocabulary terms, context_score=1.0, depth_scaling=2.0, use_bpe_dropout=True. Same configuration as t0012 production simulation.
prediction_schema: Each line is a JSON object with fields: clip_id (string), duration_s (float), transcript (string), is_empty (bool), is_hallucination (bool), latency_seconds (float), ttfd_seconds (float or null), num_chunks (int), single_chunk_degenerate (bool — true for clips fitting in one 32kB chunk, i.e., duration < ~1.0s).

files.description: Per-clip transcription output for 44 synthetic short clips (0.5-3 s) from gold-92 audio
